prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约11992→13534→13349→19126→13601名。2024年因专业结构变化（土木工程等专业位次大幅后移至19126名）导致异常波动，20 25年迅速回稳至13601名，近3年（2023–2025）基本在13349–13601区间窄幅波动，2025年基准约13601名；本省物理类计划2021–2024年分别为80、80、81、82人 ，2025年增至86人；2026年计划90人，较2025年扩招4人（增幅约4.65%），扩招意味着竞争略有缓解，位次数字有增大趋势。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河海大学为211工程、双一 流建设高校；软科主榜排名2026年约第63名，近年稳定在60–65区间，属于中上游211，学校层次对考生吸引力稳定；河海大学在2026年声誉舆情文件中未出现， 无明显负面事件；抖音热度总排名第52位（较热），综合热度约62.6万，短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，报考关注度一般偏暖。历史投档异常记录中未见河海大学断档信号；水利工程A+（全国顶尖）、土木工程A、环境科学与工程A，三个A类学科与该校招生专业高度关联（水利类、土木工程、给排水、环境工程等），水利行业龙头地位对 相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业社会热度持续偏高，河海大学在这些领域均有招生；土木建筑类专业 社会热度分化观望，但河海大学土木工程为A级学科，具备一定抗跌性。本省2026年物理类考生数需估算：2025年物理类143368人，2026年总考生200000人，按近年物理类占比约7 2%估算，2026年物理类约144000人，较2025年基本持平略增，竞争压力变化不大。；河海大学位于江苏南京，属长三角核心 城市，对辽宁考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在辽宁省招生占比约2.3%–3.5%（2025年物理类86人），属中等规模省外招生，非本地高校但招生人数稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合202 5年基准位次13601名、2026年扩招约4.65%（扩招使位次后移约380名）、本省考生数基本持平、学校声誉稳定偏暖、优势学科水利工程A+持续吸引考生等因素，预计2026年物理类 最低位次较2025年小幅后移（竞争略缓解）。预测最低位次约14020名，区间13600–14440名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 11992 → 13534 → 13349 → 19126 → 13601. In 2024, due to changes in major structure (e.g., Civil Engineering and other majors significantly dropped to 19126), there was abnormal fluctuation, but in 2025 it quickly stabilized to 13601. In the recent three years (2023–2025), it has basically fluctuated narrowly within the range of 13349–13601, with the 2025 baseline around 13601. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2024 was 80, 80, 81, and 82 respectively, increasing to 86 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 90, an increase of 4 students (approximately 4.65%) compared to 2025, meaning slightly eased competition and a tendency for rankings to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 63rd, and has been stable in the 60–65 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The university's level has a stable attraction for candidates. Hohai University did not appear in the 2026 reputation and public opinion documents, with no significant negative events. Its Douyin heat total ranking is 52nd (relatively hot), with a comprehensive heat of approximately 626,000, indicating medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms and generally warm but not excessive application attention. No signs of enrollment gaps were found in historical abnormal admission records. Hohai University has A+ in Water Resources Engineering (top nationally), A in Civil Engineering, and A in Environmental Science and Engineering. These three A-level disciplines are highly correlated with the university's enrollment majors (e.g., Water Resources, Civil Engineering, Water Supply and Drainage, Environmental Engineering), and its leading position in the water resources industry provides stable attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social heat, and Hohai University enrolls in these fields. Civil Engineering and Architecture majors face divided social heat, but Hohai University's Civil Engineering is an A-level discipline, offering some resilience. The number of Physics Category candidates in the province for 2026 needs estimation: in 2025, there were 143,368 Physics Category candidates; in 2026, total candidates are 200,000. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of approximately 72%, the 2026 Physics Category candidates are estimated to be about 144,000, basically flat with a slight increase compared to 2025, so competition pressure changes little. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, which has some regional attraction for Liaoning candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Liaoning is about 2.3%–3.5% (86 Physics Category students in 2025), representing a medium-scale out-of-province enrollment, with stable numbers despite not being a local university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13601, the 2026 enrollment expansion of approximately 4.65% (which would push the ranking back by about 380 places), the basically flat number of provincial candidates, the stable and slightly warm university reputation, and the sustained attraction of the top A+ discipline in Water Resources Engineering, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly decrease (competition slightly eased). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 14020, with a range of 13600–14440.

Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Environmental Engineering

- Marine Science/Marine Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 13600–14440, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<13600), prioritize Tier 1 majors such as Water Resources Dayu Class, Electrical Engineering, and Computer Science. If the ranking is in the middle of the range (approximately 13800–14200), focus on Tier 2 majors such as Water Resources and Hydropower Engineering, Communication Engineering, and Automation. If the ranking is near the upper bound of the range (>14200), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors such as Civil Engineering (A-level discipline), Water Supply and Drainage, and Environmental Engineering to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2088 → 2502 → 2864 → 2813 → 2387. Overall, it showed a fluctuating upward then downward trend: from 2021 to 2023, rankings gradually moved back (from 2088 to 2864), slightly recovered to 2813 in 2024, and significantly recovered to 2387 in 2025. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2387; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 8 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 7 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 6 students, a reduction of 1 student (about 14.3%) compared to 2025, meaning intensified competition and a tendency for ranking numbers to decrease.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is approximately 63rd, stable in the 60–65 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities, with stable appeal to liberal arts candidates; Hohai University did not appear in the 2026 reputation and public opinion file, with no significant negative events; its Douyin popularity total ranking is 52nd (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 626,000, indicating moderately warm application attention. No gap signals were found in historical submission anomaly records for Hohai University; Hohai University's advantageous disciplines are Water Resources Engineering (A+), Civil Engineering (A), and Environmental Science and Engineering (A), all engineering-oriented, with low direct relevance to History Category candidates, but the 211 level still attracts liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category enrollment majors include Accounting, English, Human Resource Management/Labor and Social Security, etc. Accounting/Finance/Auditing majors were recommended in 2024, while foreign language majors are generally wait-and-see. The number of History Category candidates in the province for 2026 needs estimation: in 2025, there were 56,324 History Category candidates, and in 2026, the total number of candidates is 200,000. Estimating based on the recent History Category proportion of about 28%, the 2026 History Category candidates are about 56,000, roughly flat compared to 2025. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with some regional appeal to Liaoning liberal arts candidates; the History Category enrollment is small (6–8 students), a small-scale enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 2387, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 14.3% (which would move the ranking forward by about 205 places), the roughly flat number of provincial candidates, and stable university reputation, but also noting that the 2025 ranking has significantly recovered compared to 2024 (from 2813 to 2387), there is a directional conflict between the reduction signal and the recovery trend. Combined with the very small number of History Category enrollments (only 6 students), ranking fluctuations are greatly affected by individual high-scoring candidates' choices. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward compared to 2025 (competition slightly intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is about 2440, with a range of 2320–2560.

With rankings within the predicted range of 2320–2560, it is recommended to target Accounting as Tier 1, English and Human Resource Management as Tier 2 stable choices, and Labor and Social Security as a safety option. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<2320) can focus on impacting the Accounting Excellence Class; those in the middle range (about 2380–2500) should mainly choose English and Human Resource Management; those near the upper limit (>2500) are advised to prioritize Labor and Social Security to ensure admission.
